tasks.label: Build test-program.asm
tasks.command: ca65 -g test-program.asm -o test-program.o && ld65 test-program.o -o test-program.prg -C c64-asm.cfg --start-addr 0xc000 -Ln test-program.lbl --dbgfile test-program.dbg -m test-program.map

tasks.label: Build smooth_scroller_and_raster2.asm (C64)
tasks.command: ca65 -g ${workspaceFolder}/../../samples/Assembler/C64/Raster/smooth_scroller_and_raster2.asm -o smooth_scroller_and_raster2.o && ld65 smooth_scroller_and_raster2.o -o smooth_scroller_and_raster2.prg -C c64-asm.cfg --start-addr 0xc000 -Ln smooth_scroller_and_raster2.lbl --dbgfile smooth_scroller_and_raster2.dbg -m smooth_scroller_and_raster2.map
